name: My Fave, the Killer
overview: Three underground idol members cover up a murder and face escalating threats from police, detectives, a suspicious manager, and betrayal by a former member, while their lives unravel amid unresolved serial killings, forcing them to fight for survival and stardom.

trailers.title: 【ティザー】ドラマ「推しの殺人」｜Huluで最新話まで全話見逃し配信中
